query: Rinsing my face and getting things ready for my call in the study. Lower the study room blinds 1 to 35.0% closed 5 minutes from now because the sun is glaring on the desk. At 18 minutes from now, switch the bathroom heat pump 2 to heating mode so it is warm while I towel off. Then 23 minutes after lowering the study room blinds 1, move study room blinds 1 to 5.0% closed to finish darkening the study.

steps.thought: I need to verify the room IDs and device IDs for the study and bathroom before scheduling the actions. I will start by getting the list of rooms.
I need to find the device ID for 'blinds 1' in the study room. I will get the devices in the study_room.
I need to find the device ID for 'heat pump 2' in the bathroom. I will get the devices in the bathroom.
I need to understand the structure of the window covering controller to know how to set the closed percentage.
I need to check the structure of bathroom_heat_pump_2 to determine how to switch it to heating mode.
I will schedule the first action: lowering the study room blinds to 35% closed at 14:02:53 (5 minutes from now).
I will schedule the second action: switching bathroom heat pump 2 to heating mode at 14:15:53 (18 minutes from now).
I will schedule the third action: moving the study room blinds to 5% closed at 14:25:53 (23 minutes after the first action).
All three scheduled workflows have been successfully created. I can now provide the final answer to the user.

action_input.answer: I have scheduled all your requests: the study room blinds will be lowered to 35% closed in 5 minutes, the bathroom heat pump 2 will switch to heating mode in 18 minutes, and the study room blinds will be further darkened to 5% closed 23 minutes after the first adjustment.
